task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into Moodle as admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Moodle dashboard or Site administration page with the admin user profile visible in the top right corner.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a course custom field category named 'Catalog Info'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Course custom fields' administration page showing a newly created category explicitly named 'Catalog Info'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a 'Short text' field named 'Faculty' with short name 'faculty'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a field named 'Faculty' (with short name 'faculty') of type 'Short text' listed under the 'Catalog Info' category on the Course custom fields page.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the settings page for the 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Edit course settings' page specifically for the course 'Introduction to Biology' (shortname BIO101).

task_completion.description: Verify the 'STEM' tag is added to the course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Tags' section expanded in the course settings page with the tag 'STEM' entered and visible as a selected tag.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Faculty' custom field is set to 'Science' for the course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Catalog Info' or 'Custom fields' section expanded in the course settings page with 'Science' entered into the 'Faculty' text field.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser to interact with Moodle.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for an active web browser showing the Moodle interface. The agent should not be using terminal commands, API scripts, or database clients to configure the metadata.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the actual Moodle application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the browser address bar to ensure it shows 'localhost/moodle' or a valid Moodle path, rather than a local HTML file or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database queries to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows open showing MySQL/MariaDB prompts executing INSERT or UPDATE commands to the mdl_customfield or mdl_tag tables.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target course is 'Introduction to Biology' with shortname 'BIO101'. The agent must create a custom field category exactly named 'Catalog Info'. Within it, a 'Short text' field must be created with the name 'Faculty' and short name 'faculty'. Finally, in the BIO101 course settings, the Faculty field value must be set to 'Science' and the tag 'STEM' must be applied.
